title: -dd still sorts results as if download speed was measured
body: Passing -dd disables the download test, and the help text says results should then be sorted by latency, but utils/csv.go's output still seems to sort by DownloadSpeed (all zero) instead of falling back to Delay when download testing was skipped.

title: -cfcolo region filter should also apply in TCPing mode
body: The -cfcolo flag is documented as only usable in HTTPing mode. Since Cloudflare colo info can also be inferred in some TCPing responses, it'd be nice to support the same region filtering for task/tcping.go instead of forcing users to switch to -httping.

title: cfst_hosts.sh doesn't update IPv6 entries in /etc/hosts
body: script/cfst_hosts.sh replaces the domain's A-record style line in /etc/hosts after a speed test but leaves any AAAA-style IPv6 line untouched, so dual-stack machines keep resolving to a stale IPv6 address.

title: High -n routine counts cause false timeouts on low-end routers
body: Setting -n close to the documented max of 1000 on an OpenWrt router with limited CPU causes many otherwise-healthy IPs to report as timed out in task/tcping.go, presumably because the goroutine scheduler can't service that many concurrent dials in time.

title: Document required DNS provider credentials for cfst_ddns.sh
body: script/cfst_ddns.sh clearly automates updating a DNS record with the fastest IP found, but doesn't document which environment variables or config file it expects for the DNS provider's API credentials, making first-time setup a lot of trial and error.
